findings.description: The pre-draft premise check (verify each phase's premise against current source before contracting) caught three deliverables already-shipped by substrate-tempering and several stale file:line refs — turning would-be rebuilds into 'verified, recorded, moved on'.
findings.evidence: checkins 09 + 10 (P4-D1/D3a, P5-D1 found already-shipped); the premise-staleness memory.

findings.description: The remediation dogfooded itself and the fixes compounded — each phase's output improved later phases.
findings.evidence: P5's --only synced P6/P7's docs; P4's Advisory-notes channel surfaced advisories that shaped P5-P8; P3's derive-panel fix let later panels derive correctly; P1's freshness gate flagged a real stale guild (missing compile/recipe) on its first live run.

findings.description: The P7 diagnosis-gate held under pressure: shipped only the confirmed 529 retry-with-backoff and refused to mandate habit-changes for an unconfirmed output cap — the 'confirm the cause before changing habits' gate working as designed.

PLAN premises were substantially stale — the diagnosis was a 2026-05-30 snapshot and substrate-tempering moved under it, shrinking or reshaping Phases 4-5 mid-execution. Author remediation plans closer to execution, or treat premise re-verification as a formal first step.
findings.evidence: 3 deliverables already-shipped (checkins 09, 10); the cross-project premise-staleness memory.

findings.description: The checkin create-once vs 'Contract section only' prose drift recurred across ~12-17 checkins before Phase 6 reconciled it — the ev-loop skill prose described a two-write pattern the create-once CLI never supported.

Several 'mechanical' deliverables hid a required deeper fix that the PLAN's framing understated — the glob **/ zero-segment fix was needed for the P3 repoint to match bin entrypoints; compile --check needed prompt-hash self-compute before it was usable standalone.
Make the pre-draft premise check a formal phase-0 step in remediation loops — it was ad-hoc here but load-bearing every single phase.
findings.evidence: every phase opened with a premise audit; 3 caught already-shipped.

findings.description: Schedule a periodic 'audit skill-prose against actual verb behavior' sweep — the create-once drift and the derive-panel positional-arg footgun are the same authoring-vs-runtime drift class.
findings.evidence: Phase 6 D2 (prose reconciliation); the derive-panel positional-arg discovery (checkin 06).

findings.description: P4-D3b deferred: edit reviewer.md to document VERDICT: recused + an approved-advisory section, then re-fuse all ~9 reviewer-phase evaluators (a large LLM-regenerated codegen diff that wants human review). The parse-side gap was fixed in P4; the emit-side codegen is open.

Open robustness/debris: (1) guild derive-panel silently baselines on positional args — add a guard that errors instead; (2) ADR-0004 reconciliation — supersede toward the --only/--exclude-lib flag shape or build the decided per-tier verbs; (3) small: globToRegExp/globToRegex casing alignment, the griot/loom doctor-contract convergence deferred in P1.
